x-enumeration-literals.name: Compliance Check
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Compliance Check: Ensures the borrower meets regulatory and legal requirements.

Comment:
KYC (Know Your Customer) assessment: Identity verification
AML (Anti-Money Laundering) assessment: Detection of suspicious activities

x-enumeration-literals.name: Financial Evaluation
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Assesses the borrowers financial strength and ability to repay based on income, obligations, and overall financial position.

Comment:
Income: Earnings or cash inflows
DTI (Debt-to-Income Ratio): Debt obligations relative to income
Assets:  owned resources of value
Liabilities: Existing debts and obligations

x-enumeration-literals.name: Risk Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Determines the credit risk associated with the borrower.

Comment:
Credit Score  Numeric measure of creditworthiness
Risk Rating  Categorized risk level
Credit History  Past borrowing and repayment behavior
Behavior  Transaction and usage patterns
